EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} performed an action at KATAP on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} logged in to KATAP on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} logged out from KATAP on host {event_src.host}
